scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');function c(s,d){if(!fs.existsSync(s))return;fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const a=p.join(s,f),b=p.join(d,f);fs.statSync(a).isDirectory()?c(a,b):fs.copyFileSync(a,b)}}c('public','.next/standalone/public');c('.next/static','.next/standalone/.next/static');fs.copyFileSync('server.js','.next/standalone/server-wrapper.js');console.log('Static assets + server wrapper copied')"
